docs.title: Chris Krough
docs.text:
Engineering Leader | Platform Architecture | AI/ML | Cloud Infrastructure

I help organizations design resilient infrastructure, execute complex migrations, and build engineering teams that deliver. 20+ years of experience scaling platforms at Amazon, OJO Labs/RBC, Rackspace, and high-growth startups.

docs.title: What I Bring
docs.text:
Platform Engineering at Scale: Built and managed infrastructure supporting billions in transactions, hundreds of services, and global distributed systems.

Acquisition & Migration Expertise: Led zero-downtime migrations of entire engineering platforms during M&A transitions, including technical due diligence and team integration.

AI/ML Application Development: Currently building AI applications while completing DeepLearning.AI's Deep Learning Specialization. Combining infrastructure expertise with modern ML techniques.

docs.title: Highlights
docs.text: Metric Achievement Services Migrated 200+ across 6 cloud environments with zero downtime Revenue Supported $3B in transactions during 6,700% growth phase Global Scale 150+ Kubernetes clusters across 3 continents Cost Optimization Reduced hosting cost growth from 6% to 2% monthly Team Leadership Built and scaled engineering teams through 4 acquisitions

docs.title: Drover
docs.text:

docs.text: Interested in working together? I'm available for consulting engagements, advisory roles, and employment opportunities.

docs.text:
Washington DC - Baltimore Area

Available for remote engagements worldwide.

docs.title: What I'm Looking For
docs.text:
Consulting: Platform architecture, cloud migrations, M&A technical due diligence, engineering team building

Advisory: Strategic guidance on infrastructure decisions for startups and growth-stage companies

Employment: Engineering leadership roles focused on platform engineering, infrastructure, or AI/ML

docs.title: Response Time
docs.text: I typically respond to inquiries within 1-2 business days.

docs.title: Experience
docs.text: 20+ years building and scaling platforms across enterprise, high-growth startups, and technical consulting.

docs.title: RBC / Houseful
docs.text:
Director of Engineering | January 2023 - August 2025

Led technical integration after RBC acquired OJO Labs Canada. Responsible for platform engineering, security, and engineering operations during and after the acquisition transition.

Key Achievements:

  • Migrated 6 cloud environments and 200+ services in 4 months with zero downtime
  • Built Platform Engineering team from scratch, delivered 99.999%+ uptime
  • Met financial sector security requirements while preserving startup engineering culture
  • Led security vendor management, information security analysis, and compliance reporting
  • Designed and executed zero-downtime transition of all assets to RBC infrastructure

docs.title: OJO Labs
docs.text:
Director of Engineering | October 2022 - January 2023

Led Infrastructure and Platform Engineering across the organization. Prepared technical infrastructure for acquisition and positioned engineering teams for transition.

Senior Engineering Manager | May 2022 - October 2022

Scaled Infrastructure Engineering through hypergrowth phase. Managed $3M cloud infrastructure budget.

Engineering Manager / Technical Lead | October 2019 - May 2022

Built Infrastructure Engineering team from the ground up. Designed and deployed Kubernetes-based platform.

Key Achievements:

  • Supported 6,700% revenue growth and $3B in transactions
  • Maintained 99.99% uptime throughout hypergrowth
  • Reduced defect-related hours by 2,500+ annually
  • Cut hosting cost growth from 6% to 2% monthly (60% reduction)
  • Integrated teams from three acquisitions with zero regrettable attrition
  • Maintained 10/10 manager satisfaction rating

docs.title: Amazon
docs.text:
Senior Systems Development Engineer | March 2016 - June 2019

Technical lead for a 40-member team developing globally distributed telemetry and metric systems for Amazon's fulfillment network.

Key Achievements:

  • Built telemetry systems across 150+ Kubernetes clusters on 3 continents
  • Contributed to early development and beta testing of Amazon EKS
  • Represented 400 software engineers in Senior Leadership operational roadmap planning
  • Earned AWS Bar Raiser recognition for interview excellence
  • Earned Bringer of Talent award for leadership in refining systems developer interviews
  • Developed Kubernetes controllers and operators for multi-tier, globally distributed hosting
  • Designed wireless network solutions for remote facilities with unstable infrastructure

docs.title: uStudio
docs.text:
Principal Engineer / Head of Infrastructure | August 2013 - March 2016

Transformed engineering organization from traditional ops to full-stack DevOps culture.

Key Achievements:

  • Built 24/7 operations, monitoring, and logging infrastructure
  • Developed Python/React video platform tools for major media clients
  • Managed capacity planning and load testing for high-profile broadcast events
  • Established DevOps practices enabling entire team to own deployment, monitoring, and scaling

docs.title: Bazaarvoice
docs.text:
Staff Engineer | July 2010 - March 2013

Engineered cloud infrastructure and reliability for high-traffic SaaS platform.

Key Achievements:

  • Managed platform handling 50,000+ requests per second and 30 billion monthly page views
  • Led migration from traditional data centers to cloud infrastructure
  • Implemented global load balancing for zero-downtime deployments
  • Facilitated organizational shift from waterfall to agile DevOps as team scaled from 60 to 700+ engineers

docs.title: Earlier Experience
docs.text:
Rackspace | Systems Engineer II | 2008 - 2010

  • Built network automation and monitoring for tens of thousands of servers across 10 global data centers
  • Reduced hardware requirements by 60% while processing 1M+ network metrics per second

University of Pennsylvania | Systems Programmer | 1999 - 2008

  • Managed hospital information systems and medical research infrastructure
  • Implemented secure clinical networks across 700-acre teaching hospital campus
  • Designed data center and firewall solutions for medical systems

docs.title: Services
docs.text: I provide consulting and advisory services for organizations navigating complex infrastructure challenges, M&A technical transitions, and AI/ML platform development.

docs.title: Platform Architecture & Design
docs.text:
Design and implementation of scalable, resilient infrastructure that grows with your business.

Deliverables:

  • Cloud architecture design (AWS, GCP, Azure)
  • Kubernetes platform implementation and optimization
  • Microservices architecture and migration strategies
  • Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Pulumi, CloudFormation)
  • CI/CD pipeline design and implementation

Example: Designed container-based cloud infrastructure supporting AI/ML models, reducing defect-related time by 2,500+ hours annually while exceeding 99.99% reliability.

docs.title: Cloud Migration & Transformation
docs.text:
End-to-end migration planning and execution for organizations moving to cloud or between cloud providers.

Deliverables:

  • Migration strategy and roadmap development
  • Zero-downtime migration execution
  • Legacy system modernization
  • Multi-cloud and hybrid cloud architectures
  • Cost optimization and FinOps implementation

Example: Led migration of 200+ services across 6 cloud environments in 4 months with zero downtime during RBC's acquisition of OJO Labs.

docs.title: M&A Technical Due Diligence
docs.text:
Technical assessment and integration planning for acquisitions, mergers, and divestitures.

Deliverables:

  • Technical due diligence and risk assessment
  • Platform documentation review
  • Information security and compliance evaluation
  • Integration roadmap development
  • Team assessment and retention planning

Example: Contributed to RBC's acquisition of OJO Labs, participating in due diligence, platform review, security assessment, and founding team composition for post-acquisition success.

docs.title: Engineering Team Building
docs.text:
Building and scaling high-performing infrastructure and platform engineering teams.

Deliverables:

  • Organizational design for platform teams
  • Hiring strategy and interview process development
  • Team integration during acquisitions
  • Engineering culture and operational excellence
  • Mentorship and career development programs

Example: Integrated engineering teams from three acquisitions into one unified team while maintaining zero regrettable attrition and 10/10 manager satisfaction ratings.

docs.title: AI/ML Infrastructure
docs.text:
Infrastructure and platform support for machine learning workloads and AI applications.

Deliverables:

  • ML platform architecture and design
  • Model serving infrastructure
  • GPU/compute resource optimization
  • MLOps and model lifecycle management
  • Integration of AI capabilities into existing systems

Example: Currently building AI applications with TensorFlow, PyTorch, and LangChain while completing DeepLearning.AI's Deep Learning Specialization.

docs.title: Engagement Models
docs.text:
Advisory: Ongoing strategic guidance on platform decisions and architecture direction.

Project-Based: Defined scope engagements for migrations, assessments, or implementations.

Interim Leadership: Temporary engineering leadership during transitions or growth phases.

Get in Touch

docs.title: Team of Rivals
docs.text:
A strategic decision-assistance framework inspired by Abraham Lincoln's "Team of Rivals" approach, implemented as Claude AI Skills.

What It Does: Provides multi-perspective analysis for strategic decisions by simulating diverse viewpoints and constructive debate.

Technologies: Claude AI, Prompt Engineering, LLM Integration

Repository: github.com/ckrough/team-of-rivals

docs.text:
Deep Learning Specialization (DeepLearning.AI / Andrew Ng)

5-course program covering:

  • Neural Networks and Deep Learning
  • Hyperparameter Tuning, Regularization and Optimization
  • Structuring Machine Learning Projects
  • Convolutional Neural Networks
  • Sequence Models (RNNs, LSTMs, Transformers)

Skills Developing: TensorFlow, PyTorch, CNNs, RNNs, LSTMs, Transformers, Computer Vision, NLP

docs.title: Drover
docs.text:
Coming Soon

Drover is currently in development. This page will be updated with full details when the project is publicly released.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: Drover is an AI-based application demonstrating applied deep learning techniques. Built while completing DeepLearning.AI's Deep Learning Specialization, it showcases practical implementation of neural network architectures.

docs.title: Technical Approach
docs.text:
Details on architecture, model selection, and implementation will be published upon release.

Technologies:

  • Python
  • TensorFlow / PyTorch
  • Deep learning techniques from the Deep Learning Specialization

docs.title: Development Context
docs.text:
This project applies concepts from the Deep Learning Specialization by DeepLearning.AI (Andrew Ng):

  • Neural Networks and Deep Learning
  • Hyperparameter Tuning, Regularization and Optimization
  • Structuring Machine Learning Projects
  • Convolutional Neural Networks
  • Sequence Models

docs.title: Repository
docs.text: github.com/ckrough/drover

docs.title: Updates
docs.text: Check back for updates as the project progresses toward public release.

docs.title: Platform Engineering Projects
docs.text: Open source contributions to Kubernetes, AWS, and cloud infrastructure tooling.

docs.title: AWS Service Operator
docs.text:
Contributed to the design and development of the AWS Service Operator for Kubernetes, enabling management of AWS resources as Custom Resource Definitions (CRDs).

What It Does: Allows Kubernetes users to provision and manage AWS services (S3, DynamoDB, SNS, SQS, etc.) using native Kubernetes manifests.

Technologies: Kubernetes, AWS, Go

Repository: github.com/amazon-archives/aws-service-operator

docs.title: AWS VPN Controller
docs.text:
Authored the AWS VPN Controller, a Kubernetes Controller that manages AWS VPNs as Custom Resources.

What It Does: Enables declarative management of AWS VPN connections through Kubernetes custom resources.

Technologies: Kubernetes, AWS, Go

Repository: github.com/awslabs/aws-vpn-controller

docs.title: AWS EKS Cluster Controller
docs.text:
Participated in design and development of the AWS EKS Cluster Controller for managing second-tier Kubernetes clusters as Custom Resources.

What It Does: Enables management of multiple EKS clusters from a central management cluster using Kubernetes-native patterns.

Technologies: Kubernetes, AWS EKS, Go

Repository: github.com/awslabs/aws-eks-cluster-controller

docs.title: AWS Glacier Cleaner
docs.text:
Authored a Python application that identifies and deletes all AWS Glacier Archives and Vaults within an AWS Account.

What It Does: Facilitates bulk cleanup of AWS Glacier Vaults, handling the complex process of inventory retrieval and archive deletion.

Technologies: Python, AWS, Boto3

Repository: github.com/ckrough/aws-glacier-cleaner

docs.title: Other Contributions
docs.text:
Linux From Scratch (LFS): Contributed documentation, code, and processes to enhance the open-source Linux education project.

DataDog Agent: Added ability to select processes to monitor by regex pattern match. PR #1375
